sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal.-

(1) i.q. Arabic قطح to cut, to cut off, to lop; hence מַקְצוּעָה carving tool, מִקְצֹועַ a corner.

(2) to scrape, to peel, hence קְצִיעָה.

Hiphil, to scrape, i.q. קָצָה Hiphil, Lev 14:41.

Pual, part, מְהֻקְצָעֹות, i.q. מִקְצֹועִים, corners, Eze 46:22 pr. places cut off, cut away.

Derivatives, קְצִיעָה, מַקְצוּעָה, מִקְצֹעַ.
